data.title: Kadant Inc. (NYSE: KAI) named one of “America's Most Responsible Companies” for 6th year by Newsweek in 2026 for ESG efforts.
data.description: Kadant Inc., based in Westford, Mass., revealed on February 12, 2026, that it has been recognized as one of "America's Most Responsible Companies" by Newsweek magazine for the sixth year in a row. This prestigious award for 2026 highlights companies excelling in environmental, social, and governance (ESG) efforts. Kadant Inc., listed on NYSE as KAI, continues to demonstrate a strong commitment to sustainability and responsible business practices.

data.title: Coinbase Global's Q4 earnings report reveals a -37.14% miss on EPS at $0.66 instead of estimated $1.05, with revenue down by $491 million compared to the previous year.
data.description: On the afternoon of February 12, 2026, Coinbase Global (NASDAQ: COIN) unveiled its Q4 earnings report where it fell short of anticipated earnings by -37.14%, revealing an EPS of $0.66 in contrast to the projected $1.05. This resulted in a significant revenue decrease of $491.00 million compared to the previous year. Investors should take note of these figures as they indicate a downturn in the company's financial performance. For more detailed insights, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ECI Group partners with Marcus Partners to acquire 280-unit Riverside Parc Apartments in Atlanta.
data.description: An announcement from ECI Group (ECI) and Marcus Partners revealed the recent off-market purchase of Riverside Parc Apartments in Atlanta, Georgia. The acquisition involves a sizable garden apartment complex, consisting of seven buildings and a total of 280 units, located at 1925 Waycrest Drive Southwest. The joint venture expressed excitement about the opportunity.

data.title: Robert Half Inc. plans $0.59/share quarterly dividend, payable on March 13, 2026, to shareholders.
data.description: Menlo Park, California - On February 12, 2026, Robert Half Inc. (NYSE: RHI) shared news of their latest decision. The board of directors has given the green light for a quarterly cash dividend of $0.59 per share on the company's common stock. Shareholders of record will receive this cash dividend on March 13, 2026.

data.title: Hilton Grand Vacations to report Q4 and full year 2025 results in Orlando, Florida.
data.description: Hilton Grand Vacations, based in Orlando, Florida, will be releasing its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company's performance data, including key figures and statistics, will be made public in the upcoming report.

data.title: EPR Properties (NYSE:EPR) announces monthly dividend for common shareholders; payable 3/16/26 to those as of 2/27/26.
data.description: EPR Properties (NYSE: EPR) announced today that it has approved a monthly cash dividend for shareholders with a payment date set for March 16, 2026. Shareholders as of February 27, 2026, will be eligible to receive the dividend.

data.title: Seaport Entertainment Group (NYSE: SEG) to release 2025 earnings on March 4, 2026, hosting conference call on March 5 at 8:30 AM ET.
data.description: Seaport Entertainment Group Inc. (NYSE: SEG) disclosed that it will reveal its Q4 and full year 2025 operational and financial results on March 4, 2026. Following the market closure on that day, the company will share this information. A conference call and audio webcast are planned for March 5, 2026, at 8:30 AM ET to review the outcomes. For those interested in participating in the live Telephone Conference Call, use these contact numbers: Domestic: 1-877-407-3982, International: 1-20.

The company’s financial performance over this period showcased significant milestones. The specific figures and data from the report reflect the company’s progress and successes during the mentioned time frame.

data.title: Bitcoin's extended negative funding indicates heavy short positions. Will a reversal occur soon? Historical data hints at a potential bear squeeze.
data.description: For several days, the daily funding rate for Bitcoin has remained significantly negative, indicating widespread short selling. However, past data indicates a potential impending squeeze on those betting against the cryptocurrency. This suggests that a large number of traders may be forced to buy back Bitcoin at higher prices, leading to a potential increase in the value of the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Taurus Canada RNG Corp receives $10M to build first integrated anaerobic digestion facility using livestock manure.
data.description: In COALDALE, Alberta, Taurus Canada RNG Corp. has secured $10 million from the Government of Alberta's TIER program to build an anaerobic digestion and carbon sequestration plant. The facility, in collaboration with KCL Cattle Company and Kasko Cattle Co., will generate RNG solely from livestock manure. This initiative aims to reduce emissions and promote renewable natural gas production.

data.title: Anebulo Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: ANEB) reports FY2026 Q2 results, including revenue for Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Anebulo Pharmaceuticals, Inc. based in Austin, Texas, and listed on Nasdaq as ANEB, has disclosed its financial performance for the three-month period concluding on December 31, 2025. The company, focusing on developing innovative remedies for individuals experiencing severe cannabis-induced adverse effects, announced updates for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026. Notable highlights include the Board's approval of certain measures on February 6, 2026.

data.title: Eversource Energy reported full-year 2025 earnings of $1.69B, a significant increase from $811.7M in 2024, with $1.77B in non-GAAP recurring earnings.2025 EPS was $4.56, compared to $2.27 in 2024. 2025 Non-GAAP EPS was $4.76, higher than $4.57 in 2024.
data.description: In Hartford, Conn. & Boston, Eversource Energy (NYSE: ES) announced a full-year 2025 earnings of $1.69 billion, equating to $4.56 per share, a significant increase from the full-year 2024 earnings of $811.7 million, or $2.27 per share. The non-GAAP recurring earnings for the full-year 2025 stood at $1.77 billion, or $4.76 per share, compared to $1.63 billion, or $4.57 per share in 2024. The Company's 2025 updated non-GAAP recurring earnings guidance fell within the range of $4.72 to $4.80 per share.

data.title: Applied Materials (NASDAQ: AMAT) beats Q1 estimates with $7.01B revenue, $2.38 EPS, shares surge. Total revenue down 2%.
data.description: Applied Materials Inc (NASDAQ: AMAT) released their first-quarter financial results for fiscal 2026, which were disclosed after the market closed on Thursday. The company reported quarterly revenue of $7.01 billion, surpassing analyst projections of $6.87 billion. Their adjusted earnings for the quarter were $2.38 per share, also exceeding estimates of $2.20 per share. Despite a 2% year-over-year decrease in total revenue, Applied Materials maintained a gross margin of 49% for the quarter, or 49.1% on an adjusted basis. The positive earnings report has led to a surge in attention towards AMAT stock.

data.title: Nu Skin Enterprises reports Q4 2025 revenue of $370.3 million, with over 50% growth in earnings reaching $0.29 EPS.
data.description: Nu Skin Enterprises Inc. announced its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results, reporting revenues of $370.3 million, which is a 16.9% decrease from the previous year, or a 10.4% decrease when excluding Mavely 2024 revenue. There was a minimal 0.2% impact from foreign exchange, resulting in a $0.8 million decrease. Earnings per share (EPS) for Q4 2025 were $0.29, showing significant improvement from $(0.73) in the prior year, or $0.38 when excluding restructuring and other charges. The company serviced 748,796 customers, marking a 10% decrease. Nu Skin reported over 50% growth in earnings for the year 2025.
